summary: Backend (Transak + full iteration_1 regression) and frontend /transak compliance demo verified end-to-end. 29 passed, 1 skipped (openapi schema not served through ingress - covered by 404 probes). All Transak data-testids, disabled-state UX, public config endpoint, and compliance attestation work as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: Compliance attestation is enforced architecturally: /api/transak namespace has only /config (read) and /events (observational log + readback). No trade/order/payout/buy/sell/swap/transfer endpoint exists - verified by 10 forbidden-path probes returning 404 and by inspection of routes/transak.py.
transak_service.list_events_for_wallet correctly projects {_id: 0} so MongoDB ObjectId never leaks - verified in test_get_events_returns_logged_events_lowercased.
Wallet address is normalized to lowercase on both write (record_event) and read (list_events_for_wallet), so mixed-case queries match - verified.
POST /api/transak/events uses get_optional_user so it accepts anonymous events (TRANSAK_WIDGET_INITIALISED fires before login) while still binding to user_id when JWT present - both paths tested.
TransakLauncher correctly disables Buy/Sell/Swap until wallet is connected and renders the explicit launcher-disabled-note - this is the user-initiated-only pillar made visible.
WalletConnect surfaces three discrete states (wallet-no-injected / wallet-disconnected / wallet-connected) with distinct data-testids - clean for headless testing.
Frontend /transak is publicly routable (no auth wrapper) - matches the 'public compliance demo' intent so the 45-90s video can be recorded without a logged-in session.

Minor (not blocking): the openapi.json route isn't exposed through the ingress on the public URL (returns non-JSON). Not user-facing, just a test-discoverability nit. The 10-path 404 probe gives the same compliance guarantee.

success_rate.backend: 100% (29/29 executed; 1 graceful skip on unexposed openapi)
success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (public /transak load, all data-testids present, disabled launcher state, config-summary expansion, dashboard nav-transak-demo link routes correctly)

test_credentials: Tests register unique TEST_<uuid>@example.com / TestPass123! users dynamically. Transak public STAGING key 8be07021-eb1d-431a-8e9f-67bd2cf7bce9 read from /api/transak/config (no signup needed).
seed_data_creation: None - all data ephemeral (test users + ephemeral transak_events docs scoped to random 0x... wallets).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run all tests: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Transak STAGING widget cannot be walked through end-to-end via Playwright (no MetaMask in headless + Transak iframe requires KYC). The headless flow validates pre-wallet UI; widget URL build logic in TransakLauncher.jsx is testable by mocking window.ethereum if needed in a future iteration. The compliance guarantee (no trade-creation endpoint) is enforced and tested via forbidden-path 404 probes in test_transak.py::TestTransakCompliance.
rca of the issue: N/A - no failures. One graceful skip on /openapi.json (Kubernetes ingress returns non-JSON for that path); compliance attestation still verified via direct POST probes against 10 likely trade-endpoint paths.
